alert.title: Alert
alert.description: Displays a callout for user attention.

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task, typically displayed as a progress bar.

spinner.title: Spinner
spinner.description: A visual indicator that content is being loaded.

toast.title: Toast
toast.description: Transient feedback message with semantic variants.

notificationCenter.title: Notification Center
notificationCenter.description: Popover-based inbox for unread activity and quick actions.

statusBar.title: StatusBar
statusBar.description: Bottom fixed utility bar with left, center and right regions.

progressWidget.title: ProgressWidget
progressWidget.description: Metric card showing title, value, progress bar, and optional subtext.

stepper.title: Stepper
stepper.description: A multi-step progress indicator with completed, current, and upcoming states.

toastProvider.title: Toast Provider
toastProvider.description: Global toast stack manager for showing transient feedback messages.

statusScreen.title: StatusScreen
statusScreen.description: Full-page status feedback for not-found, error, offline, forbidden, maintenance, and coming-soon states.
